goal: 生成一张环境催化方向论文正文用机制示意图，按'初始体系 → 多阶段反应机制 → 最终产物'三段式因果链组织，学术克制、工程化配色

canvas.render_quality: vector-clean look, anti-aliased edges, sharp text

title_caption.caption: Proposed pathway of UV-driven photocatalytic degradation of phenolic pollutants over the TiO2/g-C3N4 heterojunction.
title_caption.position: bottom-center, italic serif or compact sans-serif, smaller font size

central_object.label: TiO2 / g-C3N4 photocatalyst
central_object.depiction: a simplified line-art schematic of a layered heterojunction: top thin slab labeled g-C3N4, bottom thicker slab labeled TiO2, an interface line in between; nearby a pollutant molecule glyph (phenol ring) and a UV photon arrow pointing onto the catalyst
central_object.position: centered horizontally, occupying ~25% of canvas width
central_object.style: thin line-art / engineering schematic, no 3D, no shading

items.name: Photoexcitation
items.summary: UV generates e- / h+ pairs in g-C3N4 and TiO2

items.name: Charge Separation
items.summary: type-II band alignment drives e-/h+ to opposite layers

items.name: Radical Generation
items.summary: •OH and •O2- radicals form at the surface

items.name: Mineralization
items.summary: ring opening and oxidation to CO2 + H2O + inorganic ions

result_region.label: Final Products
result_region.items: CO2, H2O, NO3-, SO4 2- (depending on substrate)
result_region.position: rightmost band, visually separated by larger whitespace from the mechanism stages

stage_block_style.shape: rounded rectangle (corner radius ~6px), arranged as a horizontal chain in the middle band
stage_block_style.fill: very light slate tint #F1F5F9 by default; low-saturation amber tint #FEF3C7 only for M2 and M3 (highlighted reactive regions)
stage_block_style.summary_text: single phrase, 9-10pt regular, no full sentence, no period

connectors.style: thin arrows (1.2px) with simple triangle arrowheads, dark gray #334155
connectors.rule: left initial system → mechanism stages M1→M2→M3→M4 → right final products; arrows are straight, no crossings; one optional thin labeled arrow above M3 indicating 'O2 / H2O' input

feedback_loop.rule: linear causal chain, no feedback in this variant

highlight_strategy.rule: M2 and M3 use a pale amber tint #FEF3C7 to indicate reactive zones; NEVER use glow, sparks, vivid gradients, or lens flare

must_keep: three visual zones: initial system (left), mechanism stages (middle), final products (right)
white background, no gradient, no decorative pattern
color palette ≤ 3 main colors plus pale amber highlight, must remain readable in grayscale print
only sans-serif typography, identical font family across the figure
stage labels are short phrases, never full sentences
the figure must look like a mechanism figure in Applied Catalysis B / Water Research
avoid: exaggerated UV beams, glowing molecules, sparks, lens flare
3D rendering of catalyst slabs, metallic highlights, glossy fills
cartoon mascots, emoji, decorative icons, hand-drawn wobble
marketing poster aesthetics, popular-science illustration aesthetics
fabricated band-gap values, fabricated rate constants, fabricated reaction equations beyond the user's scope
saturated brand colors, neon, vivid gradients
